full_text:
Wet lab cleaning day

8:00–12:00 am - Aino & Saun

12:00–15:00 am - Aino

People expected to join the wet lab cleaning: María, Sarah, Kürşat

We hope people can join around 9:00 am. If possible, help with point 1, but we especially need assistance with points 2 and 3:

2. Discuss and agree on the most convenient way to organize cold spaces

3. Help with transferring cells into LN boxes and then into the LN tank

Action points:

General wet lab cleaning

Ensure overall cleanliness of the wet lab space - tidying, not major reorganization unless needed

Discard expired items (chemical cupboard, shelves).

Ensure all chemicals have an ID code written by Saun.

Wipe down all surfaces.

Check shelf organization and reorganize if necessary.

Label shelves and drawers for improved visibility.

Fridge & freezer organization

Organize the following fridges and freezers:

Main lab fridge/freezer

Cell culture fridge

Lola’s room freezer

-80 freezer: especially omentum gel box

Discard expired items.

Assign shelves for specific purposes where possible (e.g., new arrivals stored in the same location).

Cell to liquid nitrogen (LN)

Transfer cells to LN.

Help with transferring cells to LN boxes and then to the LN tank.

Chemical registry

Update the chemical registry.

Complete waste forms and discard empty containers.

Lab Coats

Return unused lab coats.

Send coats not in active use for washing.
